Package recoder.convenience

Class ASTIterator

java.lang.Object
recoder.convenience.ASTIterator
public class ASTIterator extends Object
A "generic" iterator that traverses an AST and notifies a possibly registered ASTIteratorListener.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    ENTER_ALL
    Return value for ASTListener methods, that signals that all children should be entered without further questions.
    static final int
    ENTER_NONE
    Return value for ASTListener methods, that signals that no child node should be entered.
    static final int
    ENTER_SOME
    Return value for ASTListener methods, that signals that only some children nodes should be entered - each child will be queried separately.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ASTIterator()
    Creates a new ASTIterator.
    ASTIterator(ASTIteratorListener l)
    Creates a new ASTIterator assigned to the given listener.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    iterate(ProgramElement pe)
    Performs a depth first search traversal through the given AST.
    protected void
    recurse(ProgramElement pe)
    Recurses through the given AST in depth first search order.
    void
    setListener(ASTIteratorListener l)
    Assigns a certain listener to the iterator.
    protected void
    simpleRecurse(ProgramElement pe)
    Recurses through the given AST in depth first search order.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • ENTER_NONE

      public static final int ENTER_NONE
      Return value for ASTListener methods, that signals that no child node should be entered.

      • Constant Field Values

    • ENTER_SOME

      public static final int ENTER_SOME
      Return value for ASTListener methods, that signals that only some children nodes should be entered - each child will be queried separately.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ENTER_ALL

      public static final int ENTER_ALL
      Return value for ASTListener methods, that signals that all children should be entered without further questions.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • ASTIterator

      public ASTIterator()
      Creates a new ASTIterator.

    • ASTIterator

      public ASTIterator(ASTIteratorListener l)
      Creates a new ASTIterator assigned to the given listener.
      Parameters:
      l - the iterator listener

  • Method Details

    • setListener

      public void setListener(ASTIteratorListener l)
      Assigns a certain listener to the iterator.
      Parameters:
      l - the listener

    • iterate

      public void iterate(ProgramElement pe)
      Performs a depth first search traversal through the given AST.
      Parameters:
      pe - the AST element to iterate through

    • recurse

      protected void recurse(ProgramElement pe)
      Recurses through the given AST in depth first search order. This method calls the ASTIteratorListener methods.
      Parameters:
      pe - the current program element.

    • simpleRecurse

      protected void simpleRecurse(ProgramElement pe)
      Recurses through the given AST in depth first search order. This method is only called if no iterator listener has been assigned. The purpose of this method is to be specialized within subclasses: 
       
      
 protected void simpleRecurse(ProgramElement pe) {
 super.simpleRecurse(pe); dosomething(pe); }
      Parameters:
      pe - the current program element.
